mapper.insert: insert into comment_photo (bno, comment, writer, pass, secret, star, file) values ( 0, #{comment}, #{writer}, #{pass}, #{secret}, '*', #{file} )
mapper.select: select pass from comment_photo where cno = #{cno}
select * from comment_photo order by cno desc
mapper.update: update comment_photo set comment = #{comment}, file = #{file} where cno = #{cno}
mapper.select: select * from comment_photo order by cno desc limit 2
